result.summary: gist.githubusercontent.com itself exposes a public gist-content web surface; programmatic REST, GraphQL, MCP, and CLI integrations described in its llms.txt belong to other GitHub domains such as api.github.com and github.com, not gist.githubusercontent.com.
result.description: GitHub Gist is GitHub’s snippet-sharing service for hosting public or secret code, notes, and other small text files. The gist.githubusercontent.com host serves gist pages and content under the GitHub Gist product.
